name: form-tanstack-switch

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## form-tanstack-switch
**Type:** registry:example
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** @tanstack/react-form, zod

visual_summary: A customizable form component that includes a Tanstack Switch. It's typically used when a boolean value needs to be selected and can serve as a replacement for traditional checkboxes. Developers can integrate it into their forms to enhance user input and improve overall usability.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: form-tanstack-switch
Description: A customizable form component that includes a Tanstack Switch. It's typically used when a boolean value needs to be selected and can serve as a replacement for traditional checkboxes. Developers can integrate it into their forms to enhance user input and improve overall usability.
Style: e.g. default, primary, success, danger
Interactions: e.g. controlled, uncontrolled, disabled
Tags: form, Tanstack Switch, boolean, select

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
